info.name: Desert Pulse Festival
info.description: A fictional three-day desert music and arts festival combining indie, electronic, hip-hop, workshops, visual installations, and night-time desert experiences.

venue.name: Solar Stage
venue.description: Main open-air stage for headliners and large concerts.

venue.name: Mirage Tent
venue.description: Covered tent focused on electronic, experimental, and late-night sets.

venue.name: Dune Arena
venue.description: Outdoor arena for indie, hip-hop, and alternative shows.

venue.name: Oasis Workshop Dome
venue.description: Small venue for talks, workshops, acoustic sessions, and artist meetings.

performer.name: Lunar Waves
performer.bio: Lunar Waves is a electronic project that blends rhythmic sets with detailed live production.

performer.name: Neon Horizon
performer.bio: Neon Horizon is a indie project that focuses on dynamic stage energy and clean arrangements.

performer.name: Desert Echo
performer.bio: Desert Echo is a alternative project that mixes melodic hooks with festival-ready live performance.

performer.name: Solar Nomads
performer.bio: Solar Nomads is a hip-hop project that builds atmosphere through layered instrumentation and timing.

performer.name: Mirage Bloom
performer.bio: Mirage Bloom is a experimental project that delivers a set shaped for outdoor festival stages.

performer.name: Crystal Coyote
performer.bio: Crystal Coyote is a ambient project that combines tight structure with spontaneous live moments.

performer.name: Midnight Caravan
performer.bio: Midnight Caravan is a synth-pop project that leans on groove-driven transitions and strong pacing.

performer.name: Velvet Comet
performer.bio: Velvet Comet is a world fusion project that pairs genre roots with a modern live approach.

performer.name: Static Palms
performer.bio: Static Palms is a electronic project that keeps a clear sound profile with audience-focused flow.

performer.name: Golden Circuit
performer.bio: Golden Circuit is a indie project that moves between introspective passages and high-energy peaks.

performer.name: Blue Ember
performer.bio: Blue Ember is a alternative project that blends rhythmic sets with detailed live production.

performer.name: Dustline Choir
performer.bio: Dustline Choir is a hip-hop project that focuses on dynamic stage energy and clean arrangements.

performer.name: Prism Jackals
performer.bio: Prism Jackals is a experimental project that mixes melodic hooks with festival-ready live performance.

performer.name: Electric Saguaro
performer.bio: Electric Saguaro is a ambient project that builds atmosphere through layered instrumentation and timing.

performer.name: The Sand Frequencies
performer.bio: The Sand Frequencies is a synth-pop project that delivers a set shaped for outdoor festival stages.

performer.name: Nova Caravan
performer.bio: Nova Caravan is a world fusion project that combines tight structure with spontaneous live moments.

performer.name: Amber Signals
performer.bio: Amber Signals is a electronic project that leans on groove-driven transitions and strong pacing.

performer.name: Wild Mesa
performer.bio: Wild Mesa is a indie project that pairs genre roots with a modern live approach.

performer.bio: Cactus Radio is a alternative project that keeps a clear sound profile with audience-focused flow.

performer.name: Echo Atlas
performer.bio: Echo Atlas is a hip-hop project that moves between introspective passages and high-energy peaks.

performer.bio: Silver Mirage is a experimental project that blends rhythmic sets with detailed live production.

performer.name: Sunset Operators
performer.bio: Sunset Operators is a ambient project that focuses on dynamic stage energy and clean arrangements.

performer.bio: Moonlit Engines is a synth-pop project that mixes melodic hooks with festival-ready live performance.

performer.bio: The Heatwave Poets is a world fusion project that builds atmosphere through layered instrumentation and timing.

performer.bio: Neon Dunes is a electronic project that delivers a set shaped for outdoor festival stages.
